name: RICE
summary: Score features by reach, impact, confidence, and effort.
body_md: - RICE scores each feature on Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort.
author: Sean McBride
when_to_use: When ranking many features on a roadmap.
when_not_to_use: When you have fewer than a handful of items.

name: Kano Model
summary: Classify features into basic, performance, and delight.
body_md: - Kano classifies features by how they affect satisfaction.
when_to_use: When classifying features by user satisfaction.

name: Regret Minimization Framework
summary: Project to age 80 and choose to minimize future regret.
body_md: - Imagine yourself at 80 looking back; minimize regret.
author: Jeff Bezos
commentary: Best for big, irreversible, personal calls.
when_to_use: When facing a big irreversible life or career decision.
when_not_to_use: When the decision is a cheap, reversible two-way door.
